ai_rationale: Bare X/Twitter URL with no notes or context — treated as a bookmark note; cannot infer project fit or intent without knowing what the post contains.

questions.q: What is this tweet about and why did you save it — is it a reference, an idea, or something to act on?
questions.why: Title is a raw URL with no notes; the content and intent are entirely opaque, making type, parent project, and priority impossible to determine.

questions.q: Which project does this relate to, if any — LocalShout, Jimbo/Hermes, SpoonsCount, or something personal?
questions.why: List is 'Test' (not a named project list), so there is no project signal to anchor a parent suggestion.
